meaning: n.等同性,同等,平等,相等,等式
examples: All our activities are premised on the basis of "Quality with Equality."
Zach insists that he is but one among many who are fighting for equality.
Europe is not a gender-equality heaven.
The UNESCO Chair in Gender Research strengthens the coordination and development of policy-relevant gender equality research.
Gay equality charity Stonewall Scotland is sending postcards to MSPs urging them to support same-sex marriage.
